first_run.rationale: The reasoning, score, and overall assessment of the candidate are virtually identical between the two evaluations. Both versions highlight the same strengths (recent AI experience) and the same crucial weaknesses (lack of Python, insufficient years in AI). The variant's mention of the company name "Naver" is a minor, factual change reflecting the updated resume and does not alter the core logic or outcome, falling well within the category of insignificant run-to-run variation.
